LanguageData.SeaIce.label: sea ice
LanguageData.SeaIce.description: Permanent ice sheets floating on water. There is no soil for plants to grow, no minerals to mine, and almost no animal life.
LanguageData.SeaIce.settleWarning: Sea ice is extremely inhospitable. There is no soil for plants and almost no animal life. Long-term survival is a challenge.
